provisions.content: This Notice may be cited as the Export Processing Zones (Declaration) Notice, 2003 and shall be deemed to have come into force on 1 st May, 2003.

The area of land described in the Schedule hereto is hereby declared to be an Export Processing Zone: Schedule Location Mandela Road, Tabata, llala, Dar es Salaam Plot No. 32 L.O. No 101091 Area 2.732 hectares Certificate of Title 33250 Registered Owner M/S Nida Textiles Mills (Tanzania) Limited of P.O. Box 22745 Dar es Salaam. Free Access to the law supports the rule of law and access to justice. TanzLII partners with African Legal Information Institute and Laws.Africa , who provide it with technical support.
